extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won Stage 16 sprint finish, but ROGLIC Primoz took 6-second time bonus by outsprinting CARAPAZ Richard at the line.
tactical_patterns: UAE and Bora inexplicably controlled peloton despite no GC stakes, allowing Jumbo-Visma to save energy before final climb.
ROGLIC targeted intermediate time bonuses third wheel, stealing 6 seconds from CARAPAZ with better bike throw positioning.
EF ProCycling didn't pace once yet won stage; high team morale translating to opportunistic breakaway success pattern.
Crosswind opportunities ignored by Movistar despite having strongest squad and only fifth place GC; tactical passivity continued.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Actively hunting intermediate bonuses despite comfortable lead shows killer instinct, won't concede free seconds
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Lost 6-second sprint to Roglic reveals inferior pure speed when positioned equally at finish
rider_signals.CAVAGNA Remy: positive: Commentary noted 'ride of day' in breakaway after huge effort previous stage, showing exceptional recovery
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Won after recovering from COVID earlier in race; climbing improvement enabling grand tour stage wins
